name: fabulae-ex-inani
description: Fabulae Ex Inani, Stories from the Void: a Node CLI for generating world maps, civilization simulations, and Legends archives.

scripts.clean: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs clean
scripts.generate: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs generate
scripts.stress:500: npm run build && node --expose-gc --max-old-space-size=12288 dist/world-mapgen.cjs --size 640 --controls examples/controls/simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 5 --years 500 --civ-seed 77 --progress-every 100 --profile-civ-phases --gc-after-compaction --spill-event-text-dir output/stress-probes/probe-500-event-text --spill-event-text-after 10 --spill-event-text-every 5 --spill-event-text-cache-chunks 256 --civ-profile-dir output/stress-probes/probe-500-profiles --civ-profile-json output/stress-probes/probe-500-final.json --out output/stress-probes/probe-500-final.png
scripts.stress:500:review: npm run stress:500 && npm run evaluate:story-hooks -- --input output/stress-probes/probe-500-final.json --out output/stress-probes/probe-500-story-hook-report-cards --overwrite
scripts.stress:1000: npm run build && node --expose-gc --max-old-space-size=12288 dist/world-mapgen.cjs --size 640 --controls examples/controls/simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 5 --years 1000 --civ-seed 77 --expansion-rate 0.25 --progress-every 100 --profile-civ-phases --gc-after-compaction --spill-event-text-dir output/stress-probes/probe-1000-event-text --spill-event-text-after 10 --spill-event-text-every 5 --spill-event-text-cache-chunks 256 --civ-profile-dir output/stress-probes/probe-1000-profiles --civ-profile-json output/stress-probes/probe-1000-final.json --out output/stress-probes/probe-1000-final.png
scripts.serve:legends: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs serve-legends
scripts.verify:legends: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs verify-legends
scripts.publish:legends: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs publish-legends
scripts.compare:civ-profiles: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs compare-civ-profiles
scripts.evaluate:story-hooks: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs evaluate-story-hooks
scripts.outline:stories: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs outline-stories
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs generate --size 64 --controls examples/controls/simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 1 --years 1 --civ-workers 1 --out output/smoke/map.png --civ-json output/smoke/civilizations.json
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:determinism && npm run test:legends-determinism
scripts.test:determinism: node dist/world-mapgen.cjs generate --size 64 --controls examples/controls/simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 2 --years 40 --civ-seed 77 --civ-profile-json output/determinism/default.json --out output/determinism/default.png && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs generate --size 64 --controls examples/controls/simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 2 --years 40 --civ-seed 77 --civ-workers 1 --civ-profile-json output/determinism/one-worker.json --out output/determinism/one-worker.png && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs compare-civ-profiles output/determinism/default.json output/determinism/one-worker.json
scripts.test:legends-determinism: node dist/world-mapgen.cjs generate --size 64 --controls examples/controls/simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 1 --years 2 --civ-seed 77 --civ-workers 1 --out output/legends-determinism/a/map.png --legends-json output/legends-determinism/a/legends.json --legends-html output/legends-determinism/a/index.html && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs verify-legends output/legends-determinism/a/legends.json output/legends-determinism/a && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs generate --size 64 --controls examples/controls/simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 1 --years 2 --civ-seed 77 --civ-workers 1 --out output/legends-determinism/b/map.png --legends-json output/legends-determinism/b/legends.json --legends-html output/legends-determinism/b/index.html && node dist/world-mapgen.cjs verify-legends output/legends-determinism/b/legends.json output/legends-determinism/b && node scripts/compare-canonical-legends.mjs output/legends-determinism/a output/legends-determinism/b
